content.text: I'll verify the test passes already without any implementation changes needed.

Test passes already. The implementation is coordinate-agnostic (uses arithmetic on coordinates without any assumption of non-negative values), so negative coordinates work without modification.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No change needed
- Result: All 8 tests pass
- Approach: The existing implementation uses pure arithmetic on coordinates (`x + dx`, `y + dy`, `Math.abs`) with no array indexing or grid bounds. It treats cells as points in an infinite plane, so negative coordinates work naturally.
